changelog.changeLog: M11: Fix empty trigger Query — use CountDownTimer TimerTrigger OnComplete for observation moment

notes.text: SFX skipped — GENERATE_THIS.com placeholders preserved. Call generate_sfx to produce audio later.
Story created: "EAF Steel Tapping VR Training" — 29/29 moments generated. Written to C:\autovrse\jsonClaw\stories\eaf-steel.json

objectives: Execute safe EAF steel tapping procedures from furnace into ladles
Perform proper ladle preparation and inspection before tapping
Control tapping operations including under-arcing and without-arcing methods
Manage ferroalloy and slag forming material additions during tapping
Operate EBT (Eccentric Bottom Tapping) system correctly
Maintain proper furnace tilting control and sequencing
Ensure appropriate PPE usage during high-temperature operations
Monitor and control steel temperature and composition during tapping
Execute emergency procedures for equipment failures during tapping
procedures: Inspect ladle condition - bricks, temperature (1000-1200°C), top ring cleaning, level condition
Supervisor and Senior Melter inspect ladle cleaning and temperature using color chart
Ensure ferroalloys and slag forming materials are ready in bunkers
Turn on local control switch from EAF tapping pulpit to ON position
Move ladle transfer car to tapping position by pressing EAF tapping position button
Move material addition chute to tapping position by moving selector switch RCH01 to CCW
Verify required bath temperature and oxygen levels achieved in furnace
Ensure furnace frame lock is unlocked
Verify DRI movable chute is working properly
Turn on local control switch from EAF tapping pulpit to ON position
Enable tilting control by rotating TILT-ENABLE selector switch to ON position
For tapping under arcing: Maintain bath temperature during feeding and tapping simultaneously
Get clearance from EAF Pulpit Operator to start tapping
Start ladle stirring by selecting stirring gas (Nitrogen or Argon according to steel grade)
Increase rinsing gas pressure using STIR Line 1 and STIR Line 2 selector switches
Unlock EBT flap by pressing Extra Stroke By-Pass button and EBT Unlock button simultaneously
Open EBT flap by pressing Extra Stroke By-Pass button and EBT Opening button simultaneously
Observe EBT sand dropping and metal flow from furnace into ladle
If steel doesn't flow, use Oxygen lance to open EBT (aluminum jacket mandatory)
When 20-25 tons tapped, add ferroalloys by pressing BIN SHP01 and SHP02 Slide Gate open buttons
Add recarburizer manually during ferroalloy addition if needed
Move material addition chute to parking position using selector switch RCH01 to CW
For tapping under arcing: Open furnace main circuit breaker and lift electrodes to tapping position
Tilt furnace gradually using joystick to complete tapping
When 5-7 tons remaining to desired weight (150-155 tons), tilt furnace back to de-slagging side
Move ladle from below furnace after tapping by pressing EAF PREHEAT CHARG.POSITION button
Check ladle stirring availability
Tilt furnace to tapping position until 7° angle reached
Clean EBT bottom by closing and opening flap using Extra Stroke By-Pass and Opening-Closing buttons
Close EBT flap and lock by pressing LOCK button under EBT movement label
Open EBT cover by pressing EBT COVER OPEN button
Inspect tap hole by camera through monitoring display
Fill EBT with sand by pressing EBT SAND CHARGING OPEN button
Ensure sand forms dome-shaped pile over tap hole
Close sand hopper by pressing EBT SAND CHARGING CLOSE button
Close EBT cover by pressing EBT COVER CLOSE button
Estimate hot heel quantity after every heat (average 30 tons)
Tilt furnace to horizontal position using joystick
Clean slag door - fettling material should not exceed 10-15 cm above slag apron
Insert shell verticality locks by pressing LOCK button under FRAME label if scrap or electrode charging needed
sopContext.constraints: Use only tools and equipment in good condition and appropriate for the task. Check tools and equipment to ensure protective and safety devices, machine guards and alarms are functional. Follow all area safety warning signs and instructions. Maintain proper arrangements and housekeeping of the area. Report immediately to Supervisor any hazard, near-misses, or incidents. Any members can stop the activity if they found any unsafe condition, unsafe act or any other abnormalities and must immediately inform the shift Supervisor. All employees should comply with the safety regulations and use the safety means available to them for their own protection and protection of their fellow colleagues. Operator shall use all proper safety apparels PPE during tapping the furnace. Do not charge any material in the ladle before tapping. Supervisor and Senior Melter should inspect the ladle cleaning and temperature condition before tapping - if there is an issue on cleaning or temperature, immediately inform Slide Gate Team to replace the ladle and do corrective action. Appropriate PPE including FR clothing, leather gloves, and face shield is mandatory. Effective means of communication is a must within working team (radio). Stay at least 10 feet radius from where a suspended load could fall. Pay attention to crane siren and path of load travel. Ensure floor around work area is clean and free from obstructing objects, materials, uneven floors. Good cable management - trailing cords/cables, tools/materials organized, floors kept dry free from water, grease, and slippery liquids. All hand tools must be stored in toolbox. EBT needs to be changed or repaired by steel pipe if tapping time equals or less than 2.5 min. For emergency, call 02 507 3000 and follow emergency actions per Department Emergency Response Plan SMD 2-PR-002. Ladle temperature should be 1000-1200°C. Ladle top ring must be cleaned before sending ladle to EAF for tapping and should be in level condition after filling nozzle sand. Ladle should not exceed more than 3 minutes under EAF before start tapping to avoid excessive ladle temperature drop. Check visually the ladle before tapping to make sure it is in tapping position under EBT. Make sure steel weight is reset and becomes zero before tapping. Make sure ladle top ring is free of slag and metal accumulation to avoid touching chute during chute or ladle movement. Make sure ladle addition chute is in right position before tapping to avoid discharging ferroalloys material on ground. Make sure ladle is in tapping position under EBT. Ladle addition chute must be in tapping position and working properly (reaching working and parking position). Furnace frame locks are unlocked. DRI movable chute is working properly (reaching working and parking position). Only trained and authorized persons must operate. Ensure labels are clearly readable. Defective parts (buttons, levers) must be replaced. Timely inspection of tapping pulpit glass required. Regular and monthly cleaning of pulpit glasses required. Tapping under arcing can be performed during charging hot DRI only. Projected EBT tapping time must be above 3 min. Furnace must be kept in horizontal position during tapping under arcing. Tapping under arcing should not exceed more than 25% of molten steel inside ladle (40-ton maximum). Ladle addition chute should be moved to parking position before reaching 2° tilting angle. Required tapping temperature depends on ladle temperature and life conditions: for ladles in circulation is 1630°C +/- 10°C; for ladles out of circulation and new ladles is 1650°C +/- 10°C. Ladle must be kept under preheater before tapping. Make sure control panel is always clean to press right button. Make sure ladle preheater is in parking position. Make sure ladle is available on ladle transfer car and overhead crane is not holding ladle arms. Oxygen lance must have back fire arrestor and holder must always be pressed if pipe is inserted inside tap hole until removed from EBT to prevent pipe blockage by metal leading to back fire and burn injury. Lancing pipe must be replaced after each time use. Lancing EBT from upside EBT is not allowed. Addition of Alloys and Recarburizer on bottom of ladle is not allowed once it can boil. Do not add Recarburizer before adding ferroalloys material as it will lead to boiling inside ladle. Tilting of furnace should be done by joystick to control tilting and avoid liquid metal getting in contact with water cooled panels above tap hole which can cause damage of panels and create water leak/explosion. In case of ladle car weight system not working or malfunctioning, tapping can be done and controlled visually by ladle life and free board - minimum free board for ladle is around 400-500 mm. If any abnormality of ladle stirring, immediately coordinate with Refractory Team to prepare ladle for re-ladle activity or pour back metal into furnace in case no ladle available. Hot heel quantity has to be estimated every heat after tapping - average Hot Heel should be around 30 ton. Slag door has to be cleaned and fettling material on slag door should not be higher than 10-15 cm above slag apron. Manual handling good practices to be followed: not more than 20kg to be carried by hand; maintain proper posture (lift with legs not back); area of movements must be sufficiently wide; face toward direction you will throw shoveled load; no matter what material shoveling, always try to skim off top - do not pick up more than 10 pounds with any shovel at one time; pay attention to blade type, handle length and grip of shovel - always select most appropriate tool for job. Extra care to be taken during usage of emergency stick as it should be controlled smoothly to avoid jerking which can lead to electrodes breakages.

moments.name: Safety briefing and PPE check
moments.userAction: narration
moments.successHint: auto-advance
moments.spatialContext: Voice-over introduction covering mandatory PPE requirements

moments.name: Inspect ladle condition and temperature
moments.userAction: Touch Ladle_EAF and verify temperature 1000-1200C
moments.successHint: Temperature readout displays, voice-over confirms acceptable range
moments.spatialContext: Ladle positioned near furnace base, approach within 2m

moments.name: Verify ferroalloys ready in bunkers
moments.userAction: Touch Hopper_FeAlloys to check material availability
moments.successHint: Visual indicator confirms BIN SHP01 and SHP02 loaded, voice-over acknowledgment
moments.spatialContext: Ferroalloy hoppers elevated 3m above ground level

moments.name: Turn on local control switch
moments.userAction: Press LocalControls button to ON position
moments.successHint: LED indicator illuminates green, console powers up
moments.spatialContext: Control panel at pulpit, chest height, center console

moments.name: Move ladle transfer car to tapping position
moments.userAction: Press EAFPreheatChargePosition button and verify LadleCar_EAF positioning
moments.successHint: Ladle car moves beneath furnace EBT, position indicator confirms alignment
moments.spatialContext: Button on main console, ladle car tracks visible below furnace

moments.name: Position material addition chute to working position
moments.userAction: Press RCH01InWorkingPosition selector switch to CCW
moments.successHint: Chute rotates to tapping position, indicator light confirms CCW position
moments.spatialContext: Selector switch on left panel of console, chute visible overhead

moments.name: Verify bath temperature and composition
moments.userAction: Check SamplingConsole_01 display for 1630C target temperature
moments.successHint: Display shows 1630C +/- 10C, voice-over confirms readiness
moments.spatialContext: Main digital display on pulpit console, eye level

moments.name: Enable tilting control
moments.userAction: Rotate FurnaceTiltingKeySwitch to ON and press TiltEnable button
moments.successHint: Tilting system activates, hydraulic unlock sound, indicator illuminates
moments.spatialContext: Key switch on console upper section, TiltEnable button adjacent

moments.name: Start ladle stirring
moments.userAction: Press ArgonSelection or NitrogenSelection button and set gas flow max 300 l/min
moments.successHint: Gas flow indicator active, stirring sound begins, voice-over confirms flow rate
moments.spatialContext: Gas selection buttons on right panel, flow meters visible

moments.name: Unlock EBT flap
moments.userAction: Press ExtrastrokeBYpass and Unlock_01 simultaneously
moments.successHint: Unlock sound, indicator changes from locked to unlocked state
moments.spatialContext: Both buttons on lower console panel, spaced 15cm apart

moments.name: Open EBT flap
moments.userAction: Press ExtrastrokeBYpass and Opening button simultaneously
moments.successHint: Hydraulic opening sound, sand begins to drop, flap opens visually
moments.spatialContext: Opening button adjacent to ExtrastrokeBYpass on lower panel

moments.name: Observe EBT sand drop and steel flow
moments.userAction: Monitor Furnace and Ladle_EAF for steel flow initiation, minimum 3 minutes
moments.successHint: Molten steel stream visible, timer displays 3+ minutes, voice-over confirms flow
moments.spatialContext: View from pulpit toward furnace base, steel stream visible below EBT

moments.name: Use Oxygen lance if steel does not flow
moments.userAction: Grab LancingPipe and insert into EBT to clear blockage
moments.successHint: Lance ignites, blockage clears, steel flow resumes, voice-over caution on aluminum jacket
moments.spatialContext: Lance stored on right wall rack, 1.5m length, aim toward tap hole

moments.name: Wait until 20-25 tons in ladle
moments.userAction: Monitor Ladle_EAF weight display until 20-25 ton threshold
moments.successHint: Weight indicator reaches 20-25 tons, voice-over signals alloy addition readiness
moments.spatialContext: Weight display on console, ladle filling visible below

moments.name: Open ferroalloy slide gates
moments.userAction: Press BinShip01SlideGateOpen and BinShip02SlideGateOpen simultaneously
moments.successHint: Ferroalloys discharge through chute into ladle, gate indicators show open position
moments.spatialContext: Gate open buttons on upper right panel, chute discharge visible overhead

moments.name: Move chute to parking position before 2 degree tilt
moments.userAction: Press RCH01InParkPosition selector switch to CW before furnace tilts 2 degrees
moments.successHint: Chute retracts to park position, indicator confirms CW position, voice-over confirms safe clearance
moments.spatialContext: Selector switch on left panel, tilt angle gauge shows below 2 degrees

moments.name: Open circuit breaker and lift electrodes
moments.userAction: Rotate FurnaceBreakerKeySwitch01 and observe Electrodes lift to tapping position
moments.successHint: Breaker opens with audible click, electrodes rise, arc extinguishes
moments.spatialContext: Breaker key switch on console upper section, electrodes visible through window

moments.name: Tilt furnace gradually
moments.userAction: Push Joystick_Left forward to tilt Furnace, avoid water cooled panels contact
moments.successHint: Furnace tilts smoothly, steel pours steadily, tilt angle gauge increases, voice-over cautions on panels
moments.spatialContext: Joystick on remote controller left side, furnace tilts forward in view

moments.name: Tilt back at 5-7 tons remaining
moments.userAction: Pull Joystick_Left backward to de-slag when 5-7 tons remain, target 150-155 tons total
moments.successHint: Furnace tilts to de-slagging side, weight display shows 150-155 tons, voice-over confirms completion
moments.spatialContext: Reverse joystick motion, furnace tilts opposite direction, slag separates

moments.name: Move ladle to preheat/charging position
moments.userAction: Press EAFPreheatChargePosition to move LadleCar_EAF away from furnace
moments.successHint: Ladle car moves to preheater zone, position indicator confirms, voice-over confirms ladle clear
moments.spatialContext: Position button on main console, ladle car tracks extend to preheat area

moments.name: Tilt furnace to 7 degrees and clean EBT bottom
moments.userAction: Use Joystick_Left to tilt Furnace to 7 degrees, press Closing and Opening cycle
moments.successHint: Furnace reaches 7 degrees, EBT flap cycles open/close, cleaning motion visible
moments.spatialContext: Joystick forward tilt, angle gauge shows 7 degrees, flap cycling buttons on lower panel

moments.name: Close EBT flap and lock
moments.userAction: Press Closing button then Lock_01 to secure EBT flap
moments.successHint: Flap closes fully, lock engages with audible click, indicator shows locked state
moments.spatialContext: Closing and Lock buttons on lower panel, flap closes visibly below furnace

moments.name: Open EBT cover
moments.userAction: Press PowerSwitch_Cover to open EBT access cover
moments.successHint: Cover slides open, interior tap hole visible, indicator confirms open
moments.spatialContext: Cover button on mid-panel, cover movement visible at furnace base

moments.name: Inspect tap hole via monitoring display
moments.userAction: Check EAF_System_Miniature display for tap hole condition via camera
moments.successHint: Camera feed shows tap hole interior, voice-over confirms condition assessment
moments.spatialContext: Monitoring display on right console section, camera feed at eye level

moments.name: Fill EBT with sand
moments.userAction: Press BinShip01SlideGateOpen to discharge sand through Forklift_Sandgun, form dome over tap hole
moments.successHint: Sand flows into EBT, dome-shaped pile forms over tap hole, voice-over confirms proper fill
moments.spatialContext: Sand gate button upper panel, sand flow visible through camera feed

moments.name: Close sand hopper and EBT cover
moments.userAction: Press BinShip01SlideGateClose then PowerSwitch_Cover to secure sand system and cover
moments.successHint: Sand gate closes, cover slides shut, indicators confirm closed state
moments.spatialContext: Close buttons on respective panels, cover closes over EBT

moments.name: Estimate hot heel quantity
moments.userAction: narration
moments.successHint: auto-advance
moments.spatialContext: Voice-over explains hot heel estimation, average 30 tons, impact on next heat DRI charge

moments.name: Return furnace to horizontal position
moments.userAction: Use Joystick_Left to return Furnace to 0 degrees horizontal
moments.successHint: Furnace tilts back to horizontal, angle gauge reads 0 degrees, voice-over confirms position
moments.spatialContext: Joystick centered, furnace visibly level, hydraulic hum settles

moments.name: Clean slag door and check fettling material
moments.userAction: narration
moments.successHint: auto-advance
moments.spatialContext: Voice-over instructs slag door cleaning procedure, fettling material max 10-15cm above apron
